title: deployment.export.requested
description: Inbound export request event consumed by anvilkit-export-worker from the queue (Redis Streams stream anvilkit:deployment.export.requested at MVP). Field vocabulary preserves PRD 0008 §8.1 exactly. Event fields renderMode/version/slug are hints only: the worker reconciles them against the authoritative deployment record (FR-004); a mismatch is non-retryable VALIDATION_FAILED. Additive evolution only — removing or renaming a field requires a schema version bump (FR-002). Consumers must tolerate unknown additional properties.

deploymentId.description: Deployment record ID — the authoritative idempotency anchor (one deploymentId → at most one artifact manifest)

version.description: Published version — must be pinned at render (PRD 0008 §12.1 / FR-004)

renderMode.description: Render mode; fetch_route is the MVP mode, react_ssr and html_export are deferred

targetId.description: CDN target ID (passed through to downstream)

idempotencyKey.description: Producer-supplied queue-dedup hint only; the worker derives its own artifact key from deploymentId (PRD 0008 §12)
